suggestions.rationale: EIP-8037 causing orphaned blocks across all clients due to 2D gas accounting issues (blocks exceeding limits). DevNet 3 launch was targeting April 1 but appears blocked. Need coordination assignments and cross-client fixes.

Target date is April 15 (6 days away, fallback April 22). Requires stable BAL DevNet 3 + EPBS DevNet 1 + external builder API testing. Need confirmation of merge prerequisites and timeline feasibility.

suggestions.topic: EPBS DevNet 1 status and external builder API testing
suggestions.rationale: DevNet 1 launched March 31 with Alpha 4 spec. External builder API must be tested in isolation before merging with BAL. Need status update on builder API implementation across CL teams and testing completion.

suggestions.topic: Blob DevNet 0 trunk release timeline for Nethermind/Erigon
suggestions.rationale: Both clients failing to stay at head on trunk branches due to missing stable GetBlobV3 releases. Prysm/Lighthouse targeting end of April for trunk-ready implementations. Need concrete release plans.

suggestions.topic: EIP-8136 (partial cells) inclusion decision for Glamsterdam
suggestions.rationale: Proposed for Glamsterdam inclusion on March 30. Prysm/Lighthouse implementing partial cells for 300K validator test by end of April. Need ACD-level discussion on fork scope.

Urgent batch I/O prefetch flag request from March 23 still open. Required to isolate prefetch optimization from other BAL improvements for accurate performance testing. No confirmation of delivery in subsequent meetings.

suggestions.topic: Beacon API reviews for ePBS infrastructure (PRs #593, #584)
suggestions.rationale: Two infrastructure PRs for proposal preference SSE events and envelope creation APIs assigned for review on March 30. Required for external builder implementation but no blocking impact on current devnets.
